Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Helen Baumann for Petitioner.

The Court does not understand the DNA test results and the meaning of full-siblingship. Counsel provided the background of why this petition is necessary but she has no information as to the procedure performed by the lab. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
